home.title: Fibramar Tarraco | Luxury Composite and Marine Painting Specialists
home.description: Since 1995, leaders in fiberglass repair, premium marine painting and composite work for luxury yachts and vessels at the Port of Tarragona.
home.keywords: marine painting, fiberglass, composite, luxury yachts, boat repair, Port Tarragona, nautical shipyard

services.title: Services | Fibramar Tarraco
services.description: Specialized marine repair and painting services: fiberglass, gelcoat, yacht painting, osmosis treatment, professional polishing and waxing.
services.keywords: fiberglass repair, yacht painting, gelcoat, osmosis, marine polishing, marine composite

projects.title: Projects | Fibramar Tarraco
projects.description: Gallery of completed projects: luxury yacht restorations, structural repairs, painting work and premium finishes.
projects.keywords: yacht restoration, nautical projects, boat repairs, marine painting work

about.title: About Us | Fibramar Tarraco
about.description: Meet Fibramar Tarraco: over 30 years of experience in the nautical sector, team of specialized craftsmen and commitment to excellence.
about.keywords: nautical company Tarragona, marine craftsmen, marine experience, specialized team

contact.title: Contact | Fibramar Tarraco
contact.description: Request a no-obligation quote. Contact Fibramar Tarraco for your luxury marine repair or painting project.
contact.keywords: nautical quote, shipyard contact, request quote, yacht repair Tarragona

hero.title: Excellence in Composite and Marine Painting
hero.subtitle: Craftsmen of the Sea since 1995
hero.description: We transform vessels with maximum precision and luxury finishes. Specialists in carbon fiber, kevlar, fiberglass and painting for yachts at the Port of Tarragona.

composite.title: Advanced Composite
composite.description: Custom fabrication with carbon fiber, kevlar and fiberglass. Lamination techniques for high-performance yachting, racing and large vessels.

painting.title: Painting and Treatments
painting.description: Structure painting, antifouling, original gel-coat and specialized treatments for vessels of all sizes. Durable and resistant finishes.

experience.title: Over 30 Years of Experience
experience.description: Decades perfecting artisanal techniques in the luxury nautical sector.

materials.title: Premium Materials
materials.description: Carbon fiber, kevlar and state-of-the-art materials.

team.title: Specialized Team
team.description: Craftsmen trained in the most advanced techniques in the sector.

facilities.title: Own Facilities
facilities.description: Workshop at Port of Tarragona with capacity for large vessels.

racing.title: Racing Experience
racing.description: Work for competition teams and high-performance vessels.

warranty.title: Quality Guarantee
warranty.description: We back every job with solid warranties and post-service follow-up.

testimonial1.text: Impeccable work on my yacht restoration. The paint finish is simply perfect.
testimonial1.author: Carlos M.

testimonial2.text: The Fibramar team did exceptional work with the carbon fiber on our racing sailboat.
testimonial2.author: Marc T.

testimonial3.text: True professionals. The osmosis treatment left the hull like new.
testimonial3.author: Josep A.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Vessel?
cta.description: Contact us for a personalized evaluation and no-obligation quote.

fiberglass.title: Fiberglass Repair
fiberglass.description: Structural and aesthetic repairs of hulls, decks and components. We restore the integrity of your vessel with advanced lamination techniques and perfect finishes.

painting.title: Premium Marine Painting
painting.description: High-end painting systems for luxury yachts. Professional application with climate-controlled booth and mirror finishes that last season after season.

gelcoat.title: Gelcoat Work
gelcoat.description: Restoration and application of gelcoat to restore original shine to your vessel. We repair damage, match colors and apply protective layers.

osmosis.title: Osmosis Treatment
osmosis.description: Complete osmosis diagnosis and treatment. We remove blisters, dry the hull and apply state-of-the-art epoxy barriers.

polishing.title: Polishing and Waxing
polishing.description: Professional marine detailing services. We restore shine to gelcoat and painted surfaces with high-precision polishing techniques.

custom.title: Special Projects
custom.description: Custom work for racers, sports fleets and unique projects. From structural modifications to exclusive customizations.

cta.title: Need a Specialized Service?
cta.description: We evaluate your project at no obligation

project1.title: Complete Sunseeker 75 Restoration
project1.description: Complete restoration of a Sunseeker 75 including hull structural repair, new complete paint system and interior finishes.

project2.title: Racing Team Catalunya Painting
project2.description: Painting project for racing team with corporate colors, matte finishes and high-visibility custom graphics.

project3.title: Princess V58 Impact Repair
project3.description: Bow impact damage repair with fiberglass structural reconstruction and perfect gelcoat matching.

project4.title: Beneteau 50 Osmosis Treatment
project4.description: Complete osmosis treatment with gelcoat peeling, controlled drying and new barrier system application.

project5.title: Custom Tender Riva
project5.description: Exclusive Riva tender customization with exposed carbon finishes, metallic paint and gold details.

project6.title: Classic Hallberg-Rassy Refitting
project6.description: Complete refitting project of classic sailboat including structural repairs, new antifouling and wood varnishing.

hero.title: Our History
hero.subtitle: Over 30 years dedicated to nautical excellence

story.title: Craftsmen of the Sea since 1995
story.content: Fibramar Tarraco was born from a passion for the sea and commitment to excellence. Founded in 1995 at the Port of Tarragona, we have grown to become benchmarks in the luxury nautical sector in the western Mediterranean.
story.content2: Our philosophy combines traditional artisanal techniques with the most advanced technologies. Every vessel that enters our facilities receives personalized treatment, as if it were our own ship.
story.content3: Throughout these years, we have worked with the most prestigious brands in the sector and have trained a new generation of nautical craftsmen who share our passion for a job well done.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We settle for nothing less than perfection in every detail.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Honesty and transparency in every quote and every job.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We adopt the latest techniques and materials in the sector.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We love what we do and it shows in every project.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: A team of specialized craftsmen, each a master in their discipline, united by a passion for luxury yachting.

facilities.title: Our Facilities
facilities.description: Own facilities at the Port of Tarragona with capacity for large vessels, including climate-controlled paint booth, lamination area and finishing area.
